query:
SELECT id, order_number, customer_name, customer_email, total, status, payment_status, payment_intent_id, created_at
FROM orders
WHERE order_number IN ('BO-MLF4OOG1-111Q', 'BO-MLF4M0LT-CRP9')
ORDER BY created_at;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2acBjedGBUZUvzs.4f77da611348 --database 6g8xxhsNMKiXF83cS8YGfP --execute SELECT id, order_number, customer_name, customer_email, total, status, payment_status, payment_intent_id, created_at
FROM orders
WHERE order_number IN ('BO-MLF4OOG1-111Q', 'BO-MLF4M0LT-CRP9')
ORDER BY created_at;
